action_line: websearch("\"objective\":\"Find public building science or energy guidance for insulating small conditioned sheds/outbuildings with moisture and ventilation considerations\",\"search_queries\":[\"shed insulation moisture ventilation\",\"Building America roof insulation venting\",\"Energy Star air sealing insulation\"],\"mode\":\"advanced\"")
response: "{\"session_id\":\"qtkwBuCAT6S73FNi\",\"results\":[{\"source_id\":\"7St5gj0r4ESQ0CPtI4HVa\",\"url\":\"https://www.energystar.gov/saveathome/seal_insulate\",\"title\":\"Seal and Insulate with ENERGY STAR | ENERGY STAR\",\"publish_date\":null,\"excerpts\":[\"# Seal and Insulate with ENERGY STAR\\nWinter and Summer insulation\\nWhy Seal and Insulate\\nSealing air leaks around your home and adding insulation can help your home be more comfortable and energy efficient and provide up to a 10% savings on your annual energy bills . Simple fixes include installing weather stripping on doors and caulking around windows, while bigger jobs might include sealing leaks and adding insulation in your attic. First, use these resources to choose and prioritize your air sealing and insulation projects. Second, use the how-to instructions to do it yourself, or link to qualified professionals who can help you do the job.\\n\\n...\\n\\n## DOE HOME IMPROVEMENT EXPERT CHECKLISTS\\n[See expert checklist recomm...[truncated 19688 chars]...ating Material**\\n### **Additional DOE Resources**\\nAs you make plans to improve the energy efficiency of your home, the following educational resources can provide additional information to inform your decisions.\\n[ENERGY STAR Home Upgrade](https://www.energystar.gov/products/energy_star_home_upgrade) highlights six energy efficiency improvements, including attics, windows and doors.\\nThe [Building America Solution Center’s (BASC’s) Existing Homes](https://basc.pnnl.gov/existing-homes) tool provides guides for common home upgrades, including insulation and air sealing. BASC offers decision-making criteria, construction guidance, examples of best practice, and sample contract language for including in your agreement with your chosen contractor.\\nBASC’s [Retrofit Decision Tool](https://basc.pnnl.gov/retrofit_decision_tool) makes recommendations to help homeowners reduce energy costs. Homeowners can provide information about their buildings and receive customized information.\"]}]}"

action_line: websearch("\"objective\":\"Find manufacturer specification pages for common insulation products: fiberglass batts, mineral wool, rigid foam boards, spray foam kits\",\"search_queries\":[\"Owens Corning R13 batt specs\",\"ROCKWOOL Comfortbatt R15 specs\",\"Froth Pak spray foam R value\"],\"mode\":\"advanced\"")

With its two-component, quick-curing formula Froth-Pak™ Foam System can be utilized for both air sealing and insulation, making it ideal for insulating cavities while creating a continuous air barrier by sealing penetrations and joints.\\n[Where to Buy](https://www.frothpak.dupont.com/where-to-buy-frothpak.html) View Manual View Details\\n\\n...\\n\\n## * AIR SEALS & INSULATES\\n### * CLASS A FIRE RATED\\n#### * 12.2 R-VALUE AT 2 INCHES\\nR-value of 6.2 at 1 inch thick and 12.2 at 2 inches thick, providing robust thermal resistance for enhanced energy efficiency and comfort...[truncated 23890 chars]...fficient installation, use a serrated knife to quickly cut around obstructions and penetrations\\n* Friction fit into the stud cavity to ensure optimum performance, no sag over the years\\n* Noncombustible, fire-resistant with a melting point above 1000 degrees Celcius\\n* Water-resistant material repels water providing durability to unexpected exposure to moisture\\n* Excellent sound absorbency with a high density fiber distribution\\n* Made from one of the world’s most abundant raw materials - stone wool is user friendly\\n* GREENGUARD Gold certified; chemically inert - CFC and HCFC free product and process\\n* Inorganic, does not promote the growth of fungi, mold or mildew\\n\\n## Reviews\\n4.8 ( 1161 )\"]},{\"source_id\":\"pdxi-rrczqoCyUzmyn3s3\",\"url\":\"http://ashbylumber.com/p/r13-13-15-x-93-batt-12594-sq-ft/R1315\",\"title\":\"R13 (13) 15\\\" x 93\\\" Batt - 125.94 sq ft at Ashby Lumber\",\"publish_date\":null,\"excerpts\":[\"R13 (13) 15\\\" x 93\\\" Batt - 125.94 sq ft\"]}]}"
